scenario.title: Scenario D - Repeated Miswire with Teacher Handoff
scenario.subtitle: Escalation after multiple unsuccessful attempts and declining student confidence.
scenario.lab_task: Place the voltmeter correctly while preserving a meaningful current path.
scenario.learning_objective: Explain why a voltmeter should be connected across a target component rather than inserted into the main loop.
scenario.presentation_summary: The repeated measurement miswire indicates that the learner now needs live teacher mediation rather than another round of autonomous prompting.
scenario.teacher_note: This scenario is ideal for demonstrating the handoff boundary between automated scaffolding and instructor-led intervention.

circuit.name: 电压表串联错误
circuit.description: 电压表被串入主回路，表现为几乎开路的高阻支路。

todo: TODO: 仅支持直流稳态两端器件网络。
TODO: 暂不支持受控源、交流分析、瞬态分析。

diagnostics.title: 开路
diagnostics.message: 电源 V1 的正负端没有形成有效闭合回路。
diagnostics.suggestion: 检查开关状态、连线方向，以及是否存在回到电源负极的路径。

diagnostics.title: 电压表接法异常
diagnostics.message: 电压表 VM1 没有并联在被测元件两端，更像是串联插入主回路。
diagnostics.suggestion: 电压表应并联连接在被测元件两端，而不是作为主通路的一部分。

heuristic_hints: 先追踪电流路径：电流是否能从电源正极出发，再回到负极？
电压表测的是两点电势差，因此应关注它连接的是哪两个端点。
direct_fixes: 优先检查开关是否断开，以及是否缺少返回电源负极的连接。
把电压表并接在被测元件两端，而不是插入主回路。
teacher_actions: 教师可现场画出最小闭合回路，对比开路前后电流读数变化。
教师可示范把电压表从主回路挪到负载两端，比较读数变化。

presentation.scenario_title: Scenario D - Repeated Miswire with Teacher Handoff
presentation.scenario_subtitle: Escalation after multiple unsuccessful attempts and declining student confidence.

summary_cards.title: Circuit State
summary_cards.detail: The repeated measurement miswire indicates that the learner now needs live teacher mediation rather than another round of autonomous prompting.

summary_cards.title: Intervention
summary_cards.detail: Escalation is forced by repeated unsuccessful attempts in the showcase metadata.

presentation.system_judgement: The measurement chain behaves like an artificial open path because the voltmeter has been inserted into the main loop instead of across the target load.
presentation.pedagogical_interpretation: The learner has attached a high-impedance instrument as though it were part of the conductive path. This creates a strong opportunity to explain why voltmeters reveal potential difference rather than carry the main loop current.
presentation.recommended_next_step: Pause autonomous guidance, bring the instructor into the loop, and use the current state as a supervised correction case.
presentation_script: Chen Yinuo is currently working on 'Place the voltmeter correctly while preserving a meaningful current path.' in scenario 'Scenario D - Repeated Miswire with Teacher Handoff'.
The system classifies the circuit state as Instrument Miswire with risk level elevated after attempt 4.
Pause autonomous guidance, bring the instructor into the loop, and use the current state as a supervised correction case.
presentation.teacher_note: This scenario is ideal for demonstrating the handoff boundary between automated scaffolding and instructor-led intervention.
metadata_rows: Place the voltmeter correctly while preserving a meaningful current path.
Explain why a voltmeter should be connected across a target component rather than inserted into the main loop.
heuristic_hints_display: The voltmeter is sitting inside the main loop instead of across the target element.
No closed return path exists between the source terminals.
direct_fixes_display: Reconnect the voltmeter across the load terminals.
Restore a complete conductive loop before interpreting any readings.
teacher_actions_display: Escalate to instructor-led correction after repeated or safety-sensitive errors.
Use the high-impedance model to explain why the loop current collapses.
Reconstruct the minimal closed loop on the board before returning control to the learner.
